name: Wood and Metal Coat Rack Brass Finish - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Minimalist design meets unmatched utility in this Coat Rack from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Crafted from wood, this brown coat rack features eight metal hooks in brass finish for hanging your coats, hats, bags and more, offering smart and stylish storage for everyday essentials. Additionally, it features a cross base for extra stability. Place it in the entryway or beside a closet for efficient storage.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
